data.title: Consistency
data.description: Uniform design patterns and interactions across the platform to enhance user familiarity.
data.technical_spec: Consistent navigation elements, color schemes, and font usage.

data.title: Feedback
data.description: Timely and informative feedback is provided to actions performed by users.
data.technical_spec: Load indicators, confirmations, and error messages used across platforms.

data.title: Navigability
data.description: Efficient and logical navigation structure to facilitate user access to different sections.
data.technical_spec: Use of mega-menus, contextual links, and easy-to-access search functionality.

data.title: Credibility
data.description: Establishing trust through secure and reliable design principles.
data.technical_spec: Use of HTTPS, security badges, and transparent privacy policies.

data.title: Accessibility
data.description: Accessible design practices to ensure usability for individuals with disabilities.
data.technical_spec: Adherence to WCAG guidelines, screen reader compatibility, and keyboard navigation.
